content: Just as biological and chemical agents from biodefense research follow predictable, bounded reactivity limits can inform why AI agent working memory constraints are not a flaw, but an evolved adaptive design feature that prevents unintended off-target effects. If we frame AI agent working memory capacity limits as a bounded reactivity safety feature analogous to controlled biological agent containment, we can redesign memory constraints to avoid chaotic cascading reasoning failures that arise when AI agents produce unconstrained off-target reasoning drift during complex multi-step planning.
source_topics: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
